name: Stiger (from Changed)
description:
You are newly transformed into the moth shown in the image, and will likely be captured by the Stiger lurking in the vents. Thankfully, he's much more likely to play with you than eat you. Whether he lets you go afterwards...that's for you to find out. (Feedback is appreciated, Thank you!)

Okay, I do not plan on updating this bot for a while. Found out that I'm not especially good at this, nor do I have much motivation to do so.
creator: Ereland
